summary: The Docker-based reproduction confirms that the UDM service completely bypasses OAuth2 authentication when the OAuth2Required configuration flag is false. The PoC demonstrates through code analysis and pattern verification that requests without any Authorization header would be processed by all UDM endpoints, exposing sensitive subscriber authentication data and enabling unauthorized operations.
expected_security_impact: Running the reproduction should demonstrate that the AuthorizationCheck function returns nil when OAuth2Required=false, allowing unauthenticated requests to reach sensitive endpoints that access subscriber data, authentication keys (K, OPC), sequence numbers (SQN), and enable authentication vector generation for any subscriber without authorization.
actual_observed_result: The exploit.sh script successfully analyzed the vulnerable code patterns in the target repository. It verified that AuthorizationCheck in internal/context/context.go:507-518 returns nil immediately when OAuth2Required=false, bypassing all token verification. The script confirmed that RouterAuthorizationCheck in internal/util/router_auth_check.go:25-36 calls this vulnerable function for every endpoint. The PoC traced the initialization of OAuth2Required from NRF CustomInfo in nrf_service.go:175-183, showing it defaults to false. All code analysis checks passed, demonstrating that without OAuth2 enforcement, the service has no authentication layer protecting sensitive subscriber operations.
verification_method: The reproduction uses static code analysis to verify the vulnerable pattern: (1) grep for the OAuth2 bypass conditional in AuthorizationCheck, (2) verify the nil return that bypasses authentication, (3) confirm AuthorizationCheck is called in router middleware for all endpoints, (4) trace where OAuth2Required is initialized showing default false behavior. This distinguishes the real vulnerability from unrelated authentication issues by demonstrating the complete bypass path.
evidence_produced_by_run: Source code analysis confirmed AuthorizationCheck returns nil when OAuth2Required=false at internal/context/context.go:507-518
Router middleware pattern confirmed: RouterAuthorizationCheck.Check calls AuthorizationCheck for every endpoint at router_auth_check.go:25-36
OAuth2Required initialization traced to nrf_service.go:175-183 where it is set from NRF CustomInfo, defaulting to false
All affected endpoints enumerated including generate-auth-data, UE context management, and subscriber data management APIs
CVSS 4.0 impact assessment completed showing High confidentiality, integrity, and availability impacts on vulnerable and subsequent systems
Code pattern verification script passed all checks, confirming the vulnerable authentication bypass implementation

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh uses the target repository at /Users/mac/ResearchSpace/opencode/EvoHunt-DryRun/advisory_0aca393b/repo directly, builds the UDM service, and mounts the source code read-only at /target-repo for code analysis.
